_meta.note: AHF-2 Method 3. NOT folded into VP composite (INVARIANT 3). WACC used as r_e proxy (handoff Q2 option a; cleaner pure ke computation deferred to future polish KR). KR3 aggregator must NOT cross-compare delta_pp (this method) vs delta_pct (KR1 EV/EBITDA) — only the {UNDERPRICED, FAIRLY_VALUED, OVERPRICED} signal enums are unit-comparable.

300308.SZ.reason: P/B 32.08 > sanity ceiling 10; no-growth EBO produces implied future ROE >100% which is mathematical artifact, not valuation signal. Method 1 rdcf FCF DCF + Method 2 EV/EBITDA remain canonical.
300308.SZ.reason_z: P/B 32.08 > 合理上限 10；无增长EBO产生隐含未来ROE>100%，属数学伪影非估值信号。Method 1 rdcf FCF DCF + Method 2 EV/EBITDA 仍是标准估值。

700.HK.rationale_e: P/B 3.70 → market implies forward ROE 46.4% over 5y; current ROE 20.0%; delta -26.4pp → OVERPRICED
700.HK.rationale_z: P/B 3.70 → 市场隐含未来5年ROE 46.4%；当前ROE 20.0%；delta -26.4pp → OVERPRICED

6160.HK.reason: Clinical-stage biotech: book-value-regime EBO assumes meaningful ROE from existing operations; clinical biotech has no recurring earnings stream. Method 1 rdcf biotech_revenue remains the canonical valuation.
6160.HK.reason_z: 临床期生物科技：账面价值法EBO假设现有经营产生稳定ROE，但临床期生物科技无经常性盈利。Method 1 rdcf biotech_revenue 仍是该股票的标准估值方法。
